programs.title: Seinfeld
programs.desc: Kramer prepares for his millennium party, Jerry jockeys for position on his girlfriend's speed dial, Elaine gets irked by an inattentive saleswoman, and George tries to get sacked by The Yankees.

programs.title: Police Academy
programs.desc: As a crime wave sweeps the city and the police department suffers a shortage of officers, the mayor decrees that admission to the Police Academy will be open to any and all applicants. Now the first cadets, a collection of oddballs, eccentrics and misfits will soon be let loose on the streets. That is if they somehow manage to graduate in this worldwide hit comedy that started the series of Police Academy films.

programs.desc: Struggling to survive alone in a world scorched by Praimfaya, Clarke makes a startling discovery -- and faces a dangerous new threat.
